description: Refactor the PricingCalculator.java class in the ecommerce-pricing project to improve maintainability. Extract the hardcoded tax rate (1.0825) and shipping cost (15.00) to private static final constants named TAX_MULTIPLIER and SHIPPING_COST, respectively. Parameterize the hardcoded string "PLATINUM" in the calculateFinalPrice method by introducing a new method parameter named targetTier. Ensure that CheckoutService.java is updated to pass the required argument and that the project compiles successfully.
